title: Pendulum Lab: a browser-based research platform for nonlinear pendulum dynamics
description: Typed, modular research platform for chaotic pendulum dynamics: double/triple/driven/rope/spherical pendulum physics, Lyapunov and RQA diagnostics, basin entropy with multi-resolution Wada convergence analysis, Floquet/continuation and Neimark-Sacker tracking, codim-2 regime scans, reproducible parameter studies with adaptive experiment design, provenance-tracked ZIP research bundles, and an executable notebook export. Runs fully in the browser with a headless CLI for batch studies.
